title: Structured Output Enforcement
description: Utilize Pydantic and JSON Schema to enforce structured outputs from LLMs. Master the use of libraries like `instructor` or `outlines` to ensure LLM responses strictly adhere to valid application data models.
objectives: Utilize Pydantic and JSON Schema to enforce structured outputs from LLMs.
Master the use of libraries like `instructor` or `outlines` to ensure LLM responses strictly adhere to valid application data models.
